F24 Word in rule 34.6 omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 108(b) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### [ F25 Collection and enforcement ] of sums due under registered orders E+W


34.7 — [ F26 (1) This rule applies to—


where the court has ordered that payments due under the order be made to the court. ]


(2) The court officer must—


(3) The court officer may take proceedings in that officer's own name for enforcing payment of monies due under the order.


[ F28 (Rule 32.33 makes provision in relation to a court officer taking such proceedings.) ]


Textual Amendments


F25 Words in rule 34.7 heading substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 109(a) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


F26 Rule 34.7(1) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 109(b) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2

### Prescribed notice for the taking of further evidence E+W
